mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_behavior (user_id, material_id, behavior_type, weight, ip_address, user_agent, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{materialId}, #{behaviorType}, #{weight}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, material_id as materialId, behavior_type as behaviorType, weight, ip_address as ipAddress, user_agent as userAgent, create_time as createTime FROM user_behavior WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id as userId, material_id as materialId, behavior_type as behaviorType, weight, ip_address as ipAddress, user_agent as userAgent, create_time as createTime FROM user_behavior WHERE material_id = #{materialId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id as userId, material_id as materialId, behavior_type as behaviorType, weight, ip_address as ipAddress, user_agent as userAgent, create_time as createTime FROM user_behavior WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND behavior_type = #{behaviorType} ORDER BY create_time DESC
